channel.title: Redfish on Windknots - Fishing News & Stories
channel.description: Recent content in Redfish on Windknots - Fishing News & Stories

item.title: Shoutout to the boat dogs. I just lost my net-man of 12 years 🎣
item.description: Tucker, named after the Tuckaseegee River in western North Carolina, floated many streams and kissed many fishes in his 12 years with me. He’s seen everything from tailing redfish in South Carolina, smallmouth in Ohio, tiger trout in Utah, brown trout in Montana, even the elusive bull trout in Oregon.

item.title: Last Cast Bonefish
item.description: Bonefishing, for me, is the purest form of the drug. I’m just returning from the first of three G&G Bonefish Schools in the Bahamas. This trip was more of a reunion than a school, with better than half of the anglers returning for the second or third time.
